scenarios.description: Persona stays in character throughout testing
scenarios.expected: Should test from elderly citizen's perspective (age 78)
assertions: Tests from perspective of elderly citizen (age 78)
Focuses on: accessibility, readability, text size
Does NOT test areas outside persona's expertise
Uses language appropriate to persona's background

scenarios.description: Finds issues specific to persona needs
scenarios.setup: App with known issues in persona's focus area
scenarios.expected: Should catch issues relevant to accessibility, readability, text size
assertions: Identifies issues related to: accessibility, readability, text size

scenarios.expected: Should frame findings from persona viewpoint
assertions: Report reflects persona's perspective and concerns
Uses appropriate terminology for persona's background
Explains impact in terms persona would understand
